LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SPOTLIGHT PROPERTIES LLC'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS. RULING: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - ALTHOUGH EXPUNGMENT IS MOOT, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT FINDS THE MOTION HAS MERIT AND THAT THE LIS PENDENS WAS FILED IMPROPERLY. PLAINTIFF MUST PAY $1,978 ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS TO DEFENDANT SPOTLIGHT WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
